title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: OOB write in v8::bigint::AddAndReturnOverflow
bounty_rationale: v8 sandbox bypass with uncontrolled write
description_snippet:
#### VULNERABILITY DETAILS
Concurrently modifying a `BigInt` when it is processed by `MultiplyToomCook` causes an OOB write. The value mutated by the reproducer is read here:
```
#10 0x000055555d1d1ec7 in v8::bigint::Digits::read_4byte_aligned (i=<optimized out>, this=<optimized out>) at ../../src/b
